steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage states that for the same favorite recording, musicians prefer higher optimal volumes than nonmusicians. The question asks what follows if a musician's optimal volume for 'Heartbeats' is 82.2 dB.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — find listening to "Heartbeats" at 82.2 decibels less enjoyable than listening to it at a lower volume.: Since nonmusicians prefer lower volumes than musicians for the same recording, the nonmusician's optimal is below 82.2 dB, so 82.2 dB would be past their peak enjoyment. ✓
  • Choice B — prefer listening to other music at 82.2 decibels over listening to "Heartbeats" at that volume.: Compares different recordings, not the same one. ✗
  • Choice C — enjoy listening to the nature sounds at 82.2 decibels more than listening to "Heartbeats" at 82.2 decibels.: Overstates the relationship by claiming the nonmusician would dislike the recording entirely. ✗
  • Choice D — not find it enjoyable to listen to any recordings at a volume as low as 82.2 decibels.: Reverses the direction, implying nonmusicians prefer higher volumes. ✗
A is correct.
